meaning: n.样式,型,模范,典型,模型,原型,模特儿vt.模仿v.模拟
examples: There she began to model in clay.
I made a full-size cardboard model.
I got to drive the latest model.
The American political system, for all its faults, is the model for much of the world.
Whether this is a reasonable model for the travel industry remains to be seen.
